entries.prompt_text: Add a page number to the {position} of the page
Remove the page number from the footer

Move the page number to the {bottom_right} corner

Move the page number to {page_number_position}
Add a page number to the {left side} of the footer
Remove the floating page number that overlaps the {body text}
Move the page number inside the {margin} so it does not get clipped when printing
Add a page number next to the {company name} in the footer
Increase the page number font size to {font_size}
Change the page number font to match the {body text} font
Align the page number with the {right margin} of the body text
Add {spacing_value} between the page number and the footer divider

Switch the page numbers to {lowercase roman numerals}
Switch the page numbers to {Arabic numerals}
Remove the {parentheses} around the page numbers
Add {dashes} on both sides of the page number

Change the page numbers to {page_number_format}
Remove the period after each page number
Add the word {Page} before every page number
Change the page number style to {uppercase letters}

Reduce the page number font size to {font_size}
Enclose each page number in {square brackets}
Change the running header to {report_title}

Change the running header color to {color}
Add the {date} to the left side of the running header
Remove the bold formatting from the running header
Truncate the running header to {character_limit} characters so it fits on one line
Move the {running header} up so it does not overlap the first line of body text
Add {6pt} of space between the {header divider} and the first body paragraph
Add {company_name} to the {left side} of the footer
Add {website_url} to the {right side} of the footer
Replace the old office address in the footer with {new_address}
Add {Confidential} to the {center} of the footer
Remove the {phone number} from the footer and keep only the {website URL}

Change the footer text to {footer_text}

Remove the outdated {disclaimer text} from the footer
Move the footer text {spacing_value} above the bottom edge
Add {document_id} to the right side of the footer for version tracking
Move the {footer} down so it does not overlap the last line of body text
Add {6pt} of space between the last body paragraph and the {footer divider}
Reduce the {footer} font to {8pt} so it fits on one line without overflowing
Add a {rule_weight} rule above the footer
Add a {rule_weight} rule below the header
Remove the double rule under the header and use a single line
Extend the footer divider to the full {text width}
Align the header divider with the {text margins}

Remove the footer divider line
Change the header divider to a {dashed} line
Increase the header divider weight to {rule_weight}
Add {spacing_value} between the header text and the divider line

Add the {date} to the first-page footer only
Remove the {watermark} from the first page only
Use the {full company logo} on the first page and the {abbreviated logo} on the rest

Swap the page number and {header text} positions on alternating pages
